gt_sql: SELECT T1.superhero_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_attribute AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id INNER JOIN attribute AS T3 ON T2.attribute_id = T3.id WHERE T3.attribute_name = 'Speed' ORDER BY T2.attribute_value DESC LIMIT 1
pred_sql:
SELECT s.superhero_name
FROM superhero s
JOIN hero_attribute ha ON s.id = ha.hero_id
JOIN attribute a ON ha.attribute_id = a.id
WHERE a.attribute_name = 'Speed'
ORDER BY ha.attribute_value DESC
LIMIT 1;
question: Which hero was the fastest?
